title: Stripe provider config
description: Configuration shape for a Stripe Payments + Billing + Radar integration. Validated by PaymentProviderConfigObserver on create + update. All credentials encrypted at rest via TokenEncryptor.

publishable_key.description: Stripe publishable key. Sent to the customer's client-side SDK. Format: pk_test_... or pk_live_...

secret_key.description: Stripe secret key or restricted key. Used server-side for API calls. Format: sk_test_... / sk_live_... / rk_test_... / rk_live_... Encrypted at rest.

webhook_secret.description: Stripe webhook signing secret. Used to verify inbound webhook signatures. Format: whsec_...

api_version.description: Optional Stripe API version override (e.g. '2024-06-20'). Falls back to config('payment.providers.stripe.api_version') when unset.

connect_account_id.description: Optional Stripe Connect account ID (for marketplace flows). Payments dispatched via Stripe-Account header. Only for tenants using Stripe Connect.

radar_enabled.description: Whether to use Stripe Radar for fraud detection. Recommended: true. Increases costs slightly but reduces fraud loss.
